queue.task: Session B direction: playground vs TODO items vs new features
queue.summary: Direction set: playground first (highest leverage, transforms project into something usable), then HenryDB quick wins. Queue order confirmed.

queue.goal: monkey-lang web playground (browser-based WASM compiler demo)
queue.summary: Planned 3 BUILD tasks: browser bundle + HTML skeleton, WASM execution wiring, polish (examples/errors/sharing). Deps: lexer→parser→ast→wasm→wasm-compiler, all pure JS, no Node APIs needed.

queue.task: Bundle monkey-lang compiler for browser + create HTML playground skeleton
queue.summary: Created web playground: 96KB browser bundle via esbuild, Catppuccin-themed UI, 8 working examples (fib/closures/HOF/ackermann/mandelbrot/for/mutual-rec/nested), string runtime, Ctrl+Enter, URL sharing, responsive. All 7 examples verified.

queue.task: Wire up WASM execution in browser with output capture
queue.summary: Enhanced output display: compile/exec/total time breakdown, friendly error messages for unsupported features, WASM size stats. All functionality was already working from T3.

queue.task: Add example programs, error display, and URL sharing
queue.summary: Already completed in T3: 8 examples, URL sharing via ?code= param with clipboard copy, error display with friendly messages. No additional work needed.

queue.task: Mid-session housekeeping
queue.summary: Git push all repos: monkey-lang (rebased+pushed), henrydb (pulled+pushed), workspace (committed+pushed). All clean.

queue.task: Assess playground progress, decide next focus
queue.summary: Playground MVP complete. Next: deploy to GitHub Pages (fast), then HenryDB TODO fixes. Added PLAN+BUILD for deployment.

queue.goal: Deploy monkey-lang playground to GitHub Pages
queue.summary: Plan: use GitHub Actions to deploy playground/ to GitHub Pages. One BUILD task.

queue.task: Set up GitHub Pages deployment for playground (Actions workflow or /docs)
queue.summary: Created GH Actions workflow for playground deployment. Pages enabled at henry-the-frog.github.io/monkey-lang/. Workflow triggered, deploying.

queue.goal: HenryDB TODO fixes: JSON_TYPE bug + other quick wins
queue.summary: Investigated JSON_TYPE: actually correct (SQLite convention: integer/real, not number). Removed from TODO. Planned: composite unique constraint fix.

queue.task: Fix HenryDB composite unique constraint heap scan in dml-insert.js
queue.summary: Composite unique constraint: O(N) heap scan → O(log N) index lookup. Uses first column B+ tree to find candidates, then verifies remaining columns. Fallback to scan when no index. All tests pass.

queue.task: Housekeeping + git push
queue.summary: Git push all repos. Playground deployment confirmed live at henry-the-frog.github.io/monkey-lang/. HenryDB pushed.

queue.task: Late afternoon direction
queue.summary: Direction: extend WASM compiler for arrays (directly improves playground). Added PLAN+BUILD. 5.5 hours remain.

queue.goal: Extend WASM compiler: array literals + index access + len() + push()
queue.summary: Planned 3 BUILD tasks: (1) bump allocator + array literal, (2) index access + len(), (3) push() + playground update. Array layout: [tag:i32][len:i32][cap:i32][elements...].

queue.task: Add WASM bump allocator + array literal compilation (allocate + fill)
queue.summary: WASM array support: ArrayLiteral, IndexExpression, len(), push(), bump allocator. Added memory ops to wasm.js. All 54 existing tests pass + 12 new array tests. Arrays work in functions, loops, computed indices.

queue.task: Add array index access and len() builtin in WASM compiler
queue.summary: Already completed in T18: array index access and len() both implemented and tested.

queue.task: Add push() builtin + update playground bundle and examples
queue.summary: push() already done; added set a[i]=val, fixed function index bug for arrays-in-functions, added Sieve example (10000→1229 primes), rebuilt playground bundle (104KB). All tests pass.

queue.goal: Continue highest-value work based on progress
queue.summary: Plan: (1) WASM array test suite, (2) map/filter/reduce builtins, (3) playground HOF examples. Focus on quality + capability.

queue.task: Write WASM array test suite (formal tests for array features)
queue.summary: 23 WASM array tests: basics (7), push (4), set (3), functions (5), mixed (3). All 77 WASM tests pass. Sieve verified, recursion+arrays tested.

queue.task: Add map/filter/reduce builtins to WASM compiler
queue.summary: map/filter/reduce WASM builtins: inline-compiled with call_indirect. Pipeline verified: reduce(map(filter(...))) = 60. All 77 tests pass.

queue.task: Update playground with HOF array examples + rebuild
queue.summary: Updated playground: HOF pipeline example (filter→map→reduce), rebuilt bundle (115KB). Deployed.

queue.task: Session end housekeeping
queue.summary: Skipped — session not ending, 5+ hours remain. Will add more work.

queue.task: Midpoint assessment: what's the highest-value next step?
queue.summary: Midpoint: 12 BUILDs, all monkey-lang. Playground live with arrays+HOFs. Next: formalize HOF tests, add do-while to WASM compiler, then maybe switch to HenryDB for variety.

queue.goal: WASM HOF tests + do-while compiler support
queue.summary: Single BUILD task: HOF tests + do-while support (combined for efficiency).

queue.task: Write WASM HOF tests (map/filter/reduce) + add do-while to WASM compiler
queue.summary: Anonymous functions (pre-scan+compile), do-while, 19 HOF tests, Collatz example. 96 total WASM tests. Inline fn(x){x*x} now works in map/filter/reduce.

queue.task: Git push + daily log
Direction for remaining time

queue.goal: Next focus area based on progress

queue.task: Push + housekeeping
